review_title: I was given a Zara jumper for Xmas but Ķ
review_text: I was given a Zara jumper for Xmas but because it was purchased on the 30 Nov the store would not exchange for a smaller size on Jan 10 as I was over the 30 days. This is ridiculous as I wasn't given it till Dec 25. It was a present......!!! I only wanted a smaller size! I will NEVER shop in Zara again out of principal for the awful customer service!!
I ordered online and it arrived a few days later. Everything was great but I was a bit confused since there was no return paper?? Online it said you could return everything but I clearly couldnt.

In November I purchased one of the items from your collection. It was said that it will be delivered to the store in 2-3 days. I was in the shop 3 days after I made an order - where I was told that due to sale there is a delay with deliveries. Since I needed the item urgently I purchased it from the other retailer. I went on the trip shortly after. On the return to London, last week - I called customer service asking them to return the item automatically however I was told that I need to go to the store - receive it and return in the store. Which turns out no longer possible since it is out of date. The law states that 14 days after I RECEIVED a good I am entitled to return it. The shop refused, even though I received it just a few min ago. I find it unlawful.

review_title: I wish I could give them 0 stars!!
review_text: I wish I could give them 0 stars!!! Zara has the WORST customer service I have ever dealt with. I was in DC for Veterans Day weekend and there was a Zara store next to our hotel. I made an impulse purchase of a koala sweater from their childrens section, after overhearing my 6yr old tell her Dad, she wanted to put the sweater on her santa list. She opened the box Christmas Day and wore the sweater. I washed after one wear and the koala pattern was unraveling and literally falling apart. I contacted their customer service online, on Dec. 31st, explaining my situation, asking ONLY for an exchange. I no longer had the receipt, but I sent pictures, and internal tag information as requested, and TODAY, they sent a final response, saying after extensive evaluation, they determined it was not a manufacturing defect and that they could not assist me. What a slap in the face! This company and their customer service Are HORRIBLE. DO NOT BUY FROM ZARA! There are so many other wonderful stores that actually give a crap about their consumers. It is obvious, after reading reviews on this site, I am not alone in my strong distaste for this company.

Customer service has always been atrocious at EVERY Zara store. Im assuming during their training the staff are taught how to go that extra mile to be rude. Its been an on going joke with all family and friends as to who has gotten the worst service when we visit. I complained to Zara recently because I just had enough. I went to purchase quite a few items for myself and for my son on a lunch break. The tills on the kids floors were not open, so I went to the ground floor tills. I was told they were for exchange only. So I then when to the 1st floor tills, only to be told it was exchange only! I told the guys on the first floor that I was sent up to them and as there was no queue and barely any customers could I just pay because i needed to get back to work. They giggled and said no. So I just dumped the stuff and walked out. I have worked in shops for a long time. Only recently gettting out of retail. Who do these people think they are to be so rude. Like me, you work in a shop!! Do your job! Zara, didnt care for my complaint. They said they would forward it on to the Birmingham store. They tried to Assure me that they pride themselves on their customer service. When I emailed back to say this was not good enough I got no response. Awful.

review_title: I took back a coat today (at Zara Ķ
review_text: I took back a coat today (at Zara Princess Street ) that I was not happy with after the first time I wore it..........it kept riding up at the front because the inside lining was too heavy (I would say a manufacturing fault) which was the main problem, bought it cash 31/12/2017. The sales assistant called for the manager.......Annie.......who asked me to put on so she could see the coat on....which I did much to some embarrassment as was at the till in front of customers.....she then said that she could not and was not willing to give a refund as this was the style of the coat and it had been worn.......... Obviously which is why it was bought üò≥ she flatly refused to listen so I asked for head office number to complain, Phoned as soon as I left shop to be told take to another Zara shop and see if another manager would refund....... After reading all the complaints on this forum I think Zara should learn from most of the high street stores and send all their so called managers on a crash course on manners. Disgusted with the service I received

review_title: At Kingston store manager Isabel cant Ķ
review_text: At Kingston store manager Isabel cant manager store.Kids section manager on the Lunch at 1700 pm where is not event funny.Waited in the Que waited 45min. Very bad

Zara is just a terrible shopping experience. The queues are always long and the stores far too hot, just picking up an online order Instore takes a rediculous amount of time. This just doesnt happen with any other retailer. It took 2 Zara colleagues ages to look for my 2 orders. Only 1 given to me, the sales assistant insisted the orders had been consolidated into one box contrary to the email information I received from Zara, I got home to find this had not happened and now I have to return back to the store and queue again for the other order. Annoying!

review_title: Zara you have horrible customer Ķ
review_text: Zara you have horrible customer service. I order jeans online and I got baby shoes! That's right baby shoes. At first when I called they were very apologetic and said that someone was going to pick them up and I was going to get my package then they said that I actually had to go in the store and return them and when I did they said that there was no proof that I return them I never sending my jeans!!! You are such a ripoff. I called for the billion time and now that jeans are out of stock thanks for nothing Zara!!!!

Pathetic customer service, I just shopped at Zara noida ( India) store, unorganised store, rude and unprofessional staff at cash register. Seems staff is doing an obligation / favour to customer. Very Poor experience.
Terrible quality - shirt shrunk after one wash and they refused to refund me.

Fraud!!! Ordered 14 products online and only got 2 followed by an email apologizing for the inconvenience!!!! 2 out of 14??? That's not an inconvenience is a f***** up and really bad logistics! Still waiting for my money back of the items I didn't receive.

Item not delivered to store, told it was there, wasnt. Wont issue refund until its located. Wont allow me to cancel yet section 16 of their purchase conditions states an order can be cancelled up to 30 days of receiving shipping notification. Offered free postage on next order. Reordered original item and been charged postage. Wont refund postage. Shocking service.

review_title: Agreed with all the other comments
review_text: Agreed with all the other comments, terrible customer service. Sent me faulty items, complained was offered 10% off my order but was told complete wrong instructions. No manager can offer anything, everything has to be escalated, then you wait another 48 hours for a response, then 48 hours for the action to happen, two weeks since delivery of my original order and I'm still waiting. Customer service staff incompetent and ill mannered I wouldn't give their service a one!

review_title: This company makes some Fantastic Ķ
review_text: This company makes some Fantastic perfumes but their customer service isnt the best.I ordered many fragrances + sometimes i wait along time for them even to be shipped out then i dont even get emails to tell me they are in the store already. The last time i waited 10 days which you could order from china might arrive quicker + i still hadnt been emailed it was in the store.Their excuse was someone forgot to scan the item + it possibly could be there and so can i go and check myself.Calling the store directly couldnt get through at all.

review_title: My son brought me a coat for Christmas
review_text: My son brought me a coat for Christmas. He purchased it on 28 November. He gave it to be 26 December. Unfortunately it did not fit. When I took it back for an exchange or credit note they told me I had missed the deadline which was 28 December, so effectively I had 2 days to return it which I did not realise. I said to them that most stores extend the deadline for exchange and returns over the Christmas period. They said they had changed the policy this year and did not. I think this is disgusting service from a supposedly high end clothes shop. He also brought me a pair of leather gloves from Dune on the same day which I did not want they were happy to give me a credit note for exchange. SHAME ON YOU ZARA - our family will never purchase anything from you again. I am now stuck with a coat which does not fit me which cost the best part of ¬£100. Your should be ashamed of yourselves!!!!!!

review_title: Dont touch them with a barge pole !!!!
review_text: I ordered over 100 of goods from this site and they have not been delivered !!! I have emailed them four times not once have they replied Ive tried to phone no answer !!! If by the end of this week I hear nothing I will instruct my solicitors to speak to them . I certainly will never touch this company again !! And just Incase Zara customer service s read these many complaints .... this is my order number maybe you could sort this problem out !!! [REDACTED_PHONE]

Still waiting for delivery. Really poor service and a customer service section that defies any business logic. Promises but no delivery. Do not trust if you need it by a certain date. No Tracking either.

tried to return some xmas gifts but was told I was a few days after the 30 days period. No flexibility even when I explained that people don't buy the gifts, they are given them on Christmas day, many days or weeks after the purchase. I didn't even want cash back I wanted to exchange as one item didn't fit the other was bad quality and threads coming out. I was told to call customer service and when I did just got the same message. So it seems I was being fobbed off to get rid of me. It seems looking online that I am one of many.Never shopping at Zara again and my wife spends a small fortune in there. Zara losing good customers over this strict policy over Christmas. Zara don't care about customers and any kind of service, just money, as you can see from all the 1star reviews. Well done Zara!

agree with the delivery issue on previous threads, my order has disappeared completely, but the money was taken from my account. they will not take phone calls and online chat can only tell me my problem has been escalated. will never order from them again.

review_title: The worst online shopping experience Ķ
review_text: The worst online shopping experience ever. I ordered my clothes to the store, on the website they say 2-3 days for delivery, after a week still not notification that my parcel was ready to collect. I went to the store in Westfield white city with the parcel number, I had to wait with other customers for an half an hour where only 1 member of staff was dealing with delivery service. Finally he brought over from the office one package and said the other one is still not delivered to the store which didn't seems right because it was just a one order with 5 itmes under the same order number. He went to the back again and after a few minutes I received the other package. I feel sorry for the sales assistant who have to deal with an angry customers but the the whole pick up online delivery service in store is very bad managed.

Customer service is beyond poor. Took full money from me and gave me jacket with hoody missing, which I bought as a gift. They dont offer me replacement or the hoody of the jacket or provide me partial refund. They dragged this on for over a week, I spent hours talking to them without any good solution other than being told to send the item back. Managers didnt call back even though its been over a week. Worst customer service ever..

The absolute worst customer service I have ever received. Horrendously rude both in store and on the customer service telephone line. I ordered a dress in what seems like a baby size (I'm 5'8" and it doesn't cover my back side) and I asked to exchange it for a credit because I shop there all the time (thousands of dollars spent a year at Zara) and they would not even exchange for credit as it was past the December 30 date. I asked them what they would like me to do with a C$75 dress which doesn't fit and has never been worn and she continually responds "whatever you would like to do with it now, that's up to you." I will NEVER shop at Zara EVER again, nor will my family and I will advise anyone I come across to avoid this pathetic store with pathetic customer service and an even worse "exchange" policy. I have never had a good experience at the stores but have continued going back for God knows what reason but I will absolutely never be back after this horrible experience.

Absolutely appalling "customer service"! I have placed an order on the 9th of January and still haven't received it. I've been in contact with Zara since the 11th of January as that's when the order was out for delivery but never arrived. They kept promising they're liaising with the courier (another disastrous company, hermes) and that my order will arrive before the estimated 6 days delivery. Well, IT HASN'T! Since the 17th the tracking says the order is on its way back to the retailer and I keep trying to get my money back as they have failed to keep the contractual agreement to deliver my order before the 17th and all I get are empty promises and rude and useless "customer service" advisors (big shout out to Indre and Oana, both making empty promises and not helping at all). Zara has been one of my favourite brand for years and I have never ever expected such a thing from them. I am also completely baffled that they only have a 1 start rerview on here, I have thought I must be a rare case having issues with them. I have learned my lessons, I will never ever place an order with them again and I will advise all my family, friends and colleagues to avoid them at all costs as well.

I ordered a coat online from Zara and had no choice as it was out of stock in store. I paid a charge of ¬£3.95 for next day delivery and qualified for the service - having ordered before 19:00 on a Friday. However, I did not even receive an email until 24 hours later (long past the 'next day' period) saying that the parcel was in transit. Having phoned up demanding to know when my parcel was to be delivered earlier that day, I was 'fobbed off' with a response saying that my parcel was still scheduled for that day. Yeah right - I waited in all day and no parcel was delivered to my door. Furthermore, the time the transit email was sent, was long after the customer service phone line closes, leaving me stuck until the next day as talking to someone online does not give you the verification you need. It is the next day (Sunday) and I finally received an email from Hermes at 12:00 stating that my delivery time was 11:00 til 13:00. Well... As of yet (surprise surprise) there is still no parcel. I tried 'chatting online' with a customer service person, told them a fraction of my story but got cut off by the word count and was told someone from the relevant department would be in touch. When? How? They still haven't contacted me. Consequently, I will never be ordering online from Zara again and sincerely wouldn't recommend it. The whole process has been a stress source from the get go. A quintessential online store will deliver 'next day' if you choose 'next day' so I am disappointed with the service i have been provided with. It was the first time and last time I will be ordering from Zara.com.

review_title: Still Waiting for an answer of the Ķ
review_text: Still Waiting for an answer of the costumer service, i call them 100 times and nothing good

After ordering 120 pounds worth of clothes on Boxing Day I waited 14 days for it to arrive. Taking two days off to wait on my parcel on the 2nd and 3rd of Jan as I received an email stating it will be here between 11.00 till 12.00 so then when it didnt arrive between then I got an email saying it will come between 2.00 till 4.00. So then when it didnt arrive I checked on my Hermes and it said it was delivered at 11.59 when it hadnt. And no one rang the bell or left a card. Then taking another day off it said it was delivered at 12.01 which again it wasnt and had no card again. So then that day I had tried to contact Hermes but they dont have a telephone number and had to chat with someone over live chat. So then once I finally reached the man from Hermes after about two hours of waiting from 241 in the queue it went down to 1 then back to 2 then back to 3 then back to 1 again so when I finally reached this live chat I spoke to one of the colleagues who asked me what my parcel hasnt even been attempted and no card was left. And he said Im sorry but they dont have to leave a card and after about waiting 10 minutes every time for a Response even though I responded literally 30 seconds after he responded he said to me have I helped you with everything I said no you havent because my parcel still not here even though have said you did attempted delivery. Then he ignored me and said thank you have a lovely day and ends the chat within 5 seconds. Finally getting nowhere with Hermes I called up Zara I spoke to a lovely lady she was just a customer advisor and she helped a lot she said Im going to put a request in to see where your parcel is because they were clearly very rude and we had so many problems with Hermes and its very rude they didnt even bother to try and look for your parcel. The following day my brother stayed at home and then every email that was sent to me saying it was going to come and it didnt. Then in the evening I finally got an email saying we attempted to deliver it today at 9:30 and no one answered the door so we will send it back to the company. Then I called Zara again I spoke to a different lady she was very helpful but she was only an advisor and I said can you please put me onto manager maybe they can escalate it further and transferred me over to a manager who was extremely rude. I have never been spoken to the way that this lady spoke to me, she spoke over me and then when I was telling her my problem she wasnt listening then shes asks me again and again what the problem was. Then she stated its not my fault that you wasnt there for the parcel and I said I was there and she said they dont have to leave a card and then she went to say they dont have to ring the doorbell. I said Im sorry how my supposed to know that they are going to deliver my parcel if they dont ring the doorbell, am I supposed to sit outside and wait for them on my driveway or am I supposed mentally think that theyre there and open the door, how are they not supposed to ring the doorbell and then I said to her I qualify for free delivery so what if I actually paid for my delivery is this how you treat your customers I have been waiting eight days for my parcel and she said well it does say when you make your order because its Christmas time that its not going to come as soon as I said I completely understand that but dont say that you guys have attempted to deliver it when you havent and then she kept saying were not getting anywhere clearly very abrupt she was very rude, do you want your parcel sent to a different address, I said will it be here tomorrow she said no. So then I said when is it going to come and she said next week so I have to wait another 4 days as of the weekend. So when it did arrive I received no email or any idea It was coming so lucky I was home. Never ordered from zara online and never will be!! Avoid at all costs!!

Seriously terrible online service. Would never order again. Claimed dress had been delivered when nobody was home. Failed to follow up . Took ages to refund me. Buy in store . at least you get the item

review_title: i am very disappointed with zara online Ķ
review_text: i am very disappointed with zara online shopping services and to their delivery Purolator. BOTH re useless, waste of time. when you do shopping online, zara send you order number. they never give you tracking number with a delivery company name. after waiting for a long time i receive another email which says refunded amount. and then you will know how these two companies are playing with you... I HATE DOING SHOPPING WITH ZARA ONLINE, & I HATE DOING BUSINESS WITH these two LOSERS PURILATOR...

affordable clothes. nice products but aweful aweful god forsaken customer service. dont know what theyre talking about. all resolutions did not take place. not worth the stress. they need a huge amount of improvement. i have a faulty jacket. stiching started to come off. they will inspect and IF THE MGRS deem that it us faulty.. they will replace. is that some kind of a joke. nowonder all managers are busy when you need one because their customer service dont know anything. today i am talking to Suly. and asking me absurd questions about an order that is not even related to my replacement. an order in Nov. its February now. i am beyond disgusted. i have been waiting for my replacemnt coat. winter is almost over and i still dont have it.

cant't handle customer service at all. they will simply read the policy that call back in 72 hours, receive email 1 hour, return process in 10-14 business days, supervisor call back, but get no feed back within those time frame. case number 23544704, please don't tell me you will contact me in 24-72hours. I tried for a month now. Call in multiple times, no one called me back or send me the email or process the return. Customer service should be provided when customer have time to call you, not wait for you to call back. we have jobs and things to do. if keep making mistakes in returning or providing actual customer service, you should close those department and let people know you can only do physical stores. 80% of the representatives cannot even understand my problem and not helpful at all, try to created duplicated case or ask for something i already told them over and over again in the beginning, can't find my case, can't understand the situation, simply told me return takes 14 days.wasted way too much time with them for a loss of $100. if a refund will take a month, is it too long, zara??? you can't even solve the problem on the spot or actual call back in 72 hrs? never had any experience with other business.I am shocked there is such unprofessional things existing, and it's from Zara!

Terrible customer service experience! My online order never arrived, so after two weeks of waiting for my winter coat, I went I store three times, online chatted with customer services twice, and phoned customer services twice. Each time I was told a) my order might arrive in the next shipment, due any minute, and b) they would esclate the issue. Meanwhile my coat had sold out, so no way to send me a replacement, and I missed the rest of the January sales waiting for its arrival. Finally given a refund (still no coat, still cold!) and was promised that they would escalate my complaint and would get back to me with a goodwill gesture. Goodwill gesture never came, so I now have no goodwill towards Zara and they have lost another customer. Reading the previous reviews it seems I am not alone!

review_title: Would have given no stars if it was an option
review_text: Useless customer service line where the advisers actually admit they dont know what to do. No response on the @Zara_Care social media pages despite multiple attempts to have my query answered. No correspondence regarding the whereabouts of my order and no system to be able to track where the package is, even for a collect in store order! All round useless! They have a long way to go to catch up with the likes of other high street brands. Doubt getting a refund will be any easier if your order is missing!

review_title: I love their clothing but a lot of the Ķ
review_text: I love their clothing but a lot of the workers there are rude and arent so friendly. One lady at cash clearly didnt notice the sale price tag on a dress I bought and charged me the original price and when I went to have the price adjusted, she never even bothered apologizing. It shows how poorly the customer service is here. Hope that lady works on herself.

Quality materials used! I purchasd a black denim shirt from them a couple of weeks ago and I really like it..however the only thing they need is to improve their service more to make online transaction a little bit easier when placing orders.

review_title: What happened to Zara? Their clothes appeared not beautiful
review_text: For many years I was with Zara, they did amazing clothes . When poped up to their store I had spent ¬£400-500 for sure. Third year I am disappointed with Zara, they do terrible clothes, not beautiful patterns, fabric and colors like it was before. Very frustrated as feel I lost very good brand for my wardrobe . Just Sad :( What happened?! Did you change designer? Your designer changed his orientation or they just depressed last years ?? Hope your 2010 years will back with new expirations .

review_title: All I wanted was a new jumper
review_text: All I wanted was a new jumper! I purchased a size medium jumper online (had to order online as it wasn't available in the store). Collected from the store, took it home and tried it on it was ginormous! Took it back to a Zara store. Had to get a different jumper but that was ok, it was a nice one anyway. Exchanged it, took it home, put it on the next day. On the train to work realised the customer services person had forgotten to remove the security tag. Went back again to get it removed (no apology). Wore my jumper a few times. Went to try it on last week and noticed it was coming apart at the seames. Took it back with receipt. Two customer service people said no to the refund as it had been just over a month. Complained to the manager and she offered me a gift card which I accepted but I had to kick up a fuss and argue with them for this! I was made to feel like a con artist. Clothes are supposed to last longer than a month! After I spend this gift card I'm never going back! The staff that work at Zara are the absolute worst!

review_title: I have ordered 3 items from Zara on the Ķ
review_text: I have ordered 3 items from Zara on the 1/2/2018. The last update I got from Hermes on the tracking was on the 3/2/2018 and it said it was on its way to the courier. Today is the 13/2/2018, I called Zara, they said they will get in touch with Hermes. I have managed to speak to someone from Hermes on the live chat. They said the items are likely to be lost and asked me to contact zara for refund or replacement with no appology. I have called Zara again, and they said they cannot so anything until Hermes contacted them and is only been one side of the story from me with no apology again. I mean come on, on the system it said still on its way to the courier almost 2 weeks ago now, I wouldnt have made them up on the tracking system rite, I have paid about 100 pounds for all the items. It is just ridiculous how they deal with their customer from both sides. I wonder what can I do? I am just super frustrated. Yes

I've ordered from Zara online from the past a couple of times and have had no problem but my most recent order was a complete shambles. It was only a small order which I opted to pick-up from in-store. When I got home and opened my parcel, one of the items was missing (it was part of a set). Naturally I tried to get in touch and spoke to someone on their online chat. They advised me that someone would get in touch with me soon about the problem. A week goes by and I hear nothing, so I decide to report it in Paypal. As soon as I do that, I get a call and the lady on the phone is very reassuring and helpful and tells me everything will be sorted and that I just needed to send the item that was part of the set back to them and they would refund me. So I go ahead and do that with the RM postage label provided. Its now been two weeks and I've still not got my refund and I am appalled by their customer service. Even though I didn't order much and the item that was missing wasn't expensive, I don't expect this kind of treatment. I have now escalated the claim through Paypal and hopefully I will get my money back (thank goodness I paid through Paypal!). I will not be shopping online with Zara again.

review_title: I purchased some clothing from Zara Ķ
review_text: I purchased some clothing from Zara Southampton on Saturday 3rd Feb and paid half by cash and half by card. I was told that the till had frozen and payment hadn't gone though so I had to make payment again on my card. I did this, and automatically it was pending in my bank account. I went back into the store that day, and asked why both payments were pending, she explained that one would be cancelled and one would go though. On Monday 5th Feb, both payments went through. I called customer service and they explained that I needed to go into the store as they would process the refund quicker. I went half an hour out of my way the next day to go to the store and was told there that they couldn't refund on the card machines and that customer service would have to process it. By that time, as you can imagine I was fuming. I called customer service the next day and she apologised and said she needed proof which I sent through. Thursday 8th Feb, I had an emailing saying that I would receive a bank transfer and that they needed my card details which I sent through. I then had another email on Friday 9th repeating the same, so again I sent through my card details. I was expecting to receive my bank transfer as they are normally very fast, but still yesterday (12th Feb) I still hadn't received it. I called customer service today and was told that my transfer had been delayed until next week, and that this is head offices descision and that they didn't know why they had decided that. I am absolutely appalled seeing as all of this was a fault on there behalf. If anyone has any suggestions on what to do, please let me know.

review_title: What wonderful customer service in Zara Bluewater (NOT)
review_text: Went to Zara Bluewater today with a pair of my husbands trousers which didnt fit.I had lost the receipt.I asked a girl on shop floor could I do exchange without receipt she said yes.I looked around and found a pair of trousers for me to exchange.The till was busy downstairs so I went upstairs to the till.When I got to till and explained to the girl at till she told me no refund or no exchange without receipt.I told her what the girl had said downstairs so she went and got a manager who told me that she could not exchange the trousers.I said well what am I going to do with trousers that dont fit her answer was YOUR GOODS DO WHAT YOU WANT WITH THEM. Totally taken back the way she said it really another way was to say Fk O.No customer service experience at all just disregard in the way she said it.I will never shop in Zara again.

review_title: I buy a lot of clothes from Zara todayĶ
review_text: I buy a lot of clothes from Zara today isnt the first time I have been made to look like a complete idiot and thief in one of the stores. I purchased 2 seperate orders went in to the Manchester City centre store to pick up. Take into consideration that it clearly states you can pick up your order from any assistant, just show your order number and id. I approached a lady on the shop floor and asked if she could get my order please!! She replied no you have to go to to the till to pick up your order I told her that it clearly states on line to ask any assistant and they will collect for you! She said no you have to go to the till to collect. I went to the till after about 10 minutes a lady asked me to see the email I got to locate my order, I opened my zara app and showed her my orders she said I NEED TO SEE THE EMAIL I said this is the order she said again I NEED TO SEE THE EMAIL.. I found the email and showed her my order numbers she found one and asked me if Id already picked up the other, I said that I hadnt picked up any of my order. She then called for a manager who looked me up and down and said have you picked up the item already, I told her I would not be stood in the store picking up my order if I already had it. She then said THIS IS VERY UNUSUAL. At this point I was fuming and told her that I had not picked up any of my order AGAIN. she then told her colleague to go and check if the item was in the store, 10 minutes later she came back with both my orders. No apology nothing!!!! I then asked if I could remove the packaging from my items, I was told yes over there. I told her that normally when I collect from Zara I ask to remove packaging and its done. Assistant told me oh really I dont know was her response. I then asked if I could use some scissors and was told no sorry not for customers. EXTREMELY BAD CUSTOMER SERVICE VERY UNHAPPY WITH THE SERVICE I RECEIVED TODAY IN ZARA!! Not the first time unfortunately

review_title: I bought a nice looking grey blazerĶ
review_text: I bought a nice looking grey blazer from Zara online but unfortunately after dry cleaning it, the blazer just rippled and became all baggy and wouldnt return to its normal shape. I contacted zara to inform them of this and they told me to send photos of the faulty product so they could potentially process a refund for me. In the end they did give me a refund but I had a very hard time going about getting it! I kept gettting cut off the online chat page where I initially tried to post the photos to them. Also I had a bit of a nightmare trying to explain my case to the staff in store when I was ready to return the item for a refund after it was deemed faulty by their colleagues online. They couldnt understand why I was returning the blazer despite everything about my case being on their system after I quoted my case number. review_title: Terrible Customer Service, on line representative, in-store and customer service management
review_text: Terrible customer service. called store, chatted on line, called customer service. Was placed on hold for half hour with Toronto Bloor Street store, was asked twice why I was holding. no one came back with an answer. On line chat provided generic answers. No interest in helping solve my issue. Called Customer Service on line, only rep that was polite, but did not have the authority to make any decisions to help customer. I asked to speak to a manager, rep took my number to arrange a supervisor to call back. A supervisor called back 3 hours later without any knowledge of my concern. She called to reiterate the Zara return policy and read me the return script yet again. When I asked her if she knew why I had called, she became very defensive. When I stated my disappointment, she then said she will escalate to yet another department. All this because I have requested an exchange outside of the allocated time. It's not the policy I have the issue with, it's the rude, defensive and dismissive attitude of the employees. All companies can make exceptions and override systems to provide a customer with a good experience and to make them feel valued. I understand if I was a repeat offender of the return policy, which companies document in their systems, but I am not and am very disappointed. I will no longer shop at Zara due to this experience.

Worst customer service I've ever experienced. Purchased 10 shirts for my husband (after being a Zara customer for years and never had any issues before), and 5 out of 10 shrunk at least two sizes after first wash. They were washed FOLLOWING THE INSTRUCTIONS in the tag - cold water, hang dry) and still shrunk A LOT. My husband didn't wear and washed all the shirts immediately after purchasing (of course), and by the time he tried to wear them again the 30 days return policy was over. I tried to contact their online customer service and only got script answers and no solution or guidance. I still felt like it was absurd the fact that he only got to wear them once, and went directly to the store to show what happened. STORE: ZARA WESTFIELD CENTURY CITY STORE MANAGER: OSCAR Before I could even tell all the story to the manager, he became super defensive, accused me of lying, saying that the shirt would only shrink if I used the dryer (the shirts were clearly wrinkled from hang drying), said that he had the same shirt and it didn't happened to him, and told me that I paid only $15,00 dollars for each shirt, so I should expect them to not last?!?!?! I never even asked them for the money back, I said a store credit would be fine, considering it happened to 5 shirts, and he started creating a scene and being rude and condescending. There was another manager behind him that saw the entire conversation and pretended he didn't. Anyways, I don't need my money back and I can buy at several other stores, but Zara needs customers. So I wanted to make sure that other people know what happened and avoid them.

review_title: Worst customer service and very lame. I take my business to MANGO and ASOS and others instead.
review_text: When ZARA had a big sale on Monday, Feb 26th, 2018, I went to shop in store of Valley Fair Mall located in Santa Clara, CA. I bought two pairs of jeans in black and blue and a blazer. The black jean has the red sale tag for $12.99 and the blue one is $15.99. I purchased these three items on Monday without checking my receipt. I was happy and took a few photos to show my friend and threw the price tag in the trash thinking everything was charged correctly. When I checked my receipt on two days later, I saw that they charged me $39.99 for the black jean instead of $15.99 so that means they mislabeled the item. Two days later on Wednesday, I came to the store and talk to the store manager and told him what happened and showed him the photos. He asked me to come back with the item and I came back on Thursday, he told me he could not credit back me the different amount because I did not have the price tag on the black jean though I showed him the receipt and photos which one photo did not show the upc code clearly. So I filed the case with him and he told me he would get back to me on that day at 6pm in regard to my case and he never did. I gave him time and called back on next Monday to follow and talked to the employee and the guy on the phone said the manager would call me back and never did. Two days later same thing happened. Basically that whole week, he never called me. Losing hope with their lame and bad customer service in store, I called Zara directly to get help on the Friday and the lady on the photo asked me to submit the photos on their ZARA chat line and gave me the case numbers. Next Monday, I called back in regard to my case, the guy on the phone told me they would get back to me within 24hrs and never did. I called back again and another person said it would take 5-6 days to resolve my case. In short, for more than a month, i followed up with them and they always said they would resolve the case. After the more than a month, they said they could not give me the different amount back because the photo was not clear. It took them more than a month and that was the answer that they gave me. After this horrible experience, I realize ZARA does not give crap about their customers at all since they thought they are so popular and trendy so they do not need to give great customer service or care for their customers. It seems like they do not need their customers for they think customers need them for their bad quality high price merchandise. The employee at work at the store always looked unpleasant and annoyed by their customers. When I ordered their clothes online, it takes them almost a week to ship while I ordered clothes on MANGO and they shipped my items within a day or two and the items came from UK, I believe. I no longer want to do business ZARA because of their worst customer service and I rather buy clothes from MANGO. I am hoping that more customers would take their business elsewhere that value and actually care for them. So far, it seems like I am not the only one who had horrible experience with ZARA but others as well. It is funny how there is an option below my review stated if there is anything ZARA can help me. Well ZARA, you do not care or want to help your customers. I am done with you because I believe it is better for me to spend my money elsewhere even if I have to pay more.

Chiffon devore dress after 2 wears the side seams of the skirt were completely split open, it's not a skin fit dress, the material used is clearly not fit for purpose or seams had not been stitched with any tape to strengthen. Not a cheap price 2. Another dress printed polyester, again seams are starting to fray after around 6 wears. 3. Store staff - London Oxford street. The sales assistant pointed to the waist and told me "this is the waist" as if I was a complete idiot, I said "no, I mean what do these measure in inches? It's not a cheap store but it seems they just want to make products which can wear a few times and then go to landfill. Taking the money and not caring about the things that will make customers return.

review_title: If I could have put zero I would haveĶ
review_text: If I could have put zero I would have done so! I visited the Regent Street store and unfortunately due to the worlds most complicated sizing I had to return the trousers as they didn't fit. Email proof of problem and get an ID number but no help. Speak to the helpline but no manager available that can help. Promise to call back in 1 to 2 days but still waiting to here from the 'invisible' manager that may or may not be able to sort it. In summary I reckon that the staff in the Regent Street store are fiddling the tills but they don't seem to worry about that. I've had to contact my credit card company to get help. So I'd recommend to anyone want to shop at Zara - don't bother they have zero customer service and have rubbish clothes. I stick to my promises - that I will never ever shop in Zara.

review_title: Working and shopping here both dreadful...
review_text: I base my review on working at Zara a few years ago and also through shopping in Zara on a regular basis. I worked as a merchandiser a few years back and have to say it was a horrendous place to work. I was bullied by 2 managers and a supervisor who were all best buds. They'd all go out together getting totally wasted and then not turn in and cover for each other. Or turning up still wasted (when I started at 7am) and turning the music up so loud you couldn't think straight to work. I love music but it was totally unprofessional and really uncomfortable when (lets be diplomatic here) they were blatantly still in club mode. They'd pull me up for speaking to the other merchandiser (despite discussing the actual merchandising), basically because we were friends they'd presume we must be talking about other personal stuff (god forbid!). Other staff frequently heard them talking about me openly in the staff room and they blatantly singled me out and were outright cruel and nasty. The store was a total mess, the majority of staff unhappy (hardly surprising when run by such a clique of awful people). I was told by the manager I had to cancel a doctor's appointment booked in for 2 hours AFTER I finished my shift in case I had to stay behind to tidy store. I'd waited 2 weeks for the appointment. I was pulled in to the office and given a lengthy written warning for taking a day off to go visit my very sick grandad who had leukaemia (I was going on holiday the following day and was worried if he would live even just a few more days). I left in the end despising the place, it was a huge weight off my shoulders to leave that job. It took me a couple of years to start shopping their again. If I didn't like their clothes so much I certainly wouldn't shop there today. I still can't stand the general atmosphere in their stores. Staff are on the whole incredibly miserable and rude. I can't speak for anyone else but if they are treat anything like I was it's hardly surprising they all seem so unhelpful and grumpy. Zara on the whole don't appear to believe in customer service, its all about replenishing stock and keeping store in order. However they don't seem to get that right either as the majority of stores I've been to are usually a big mess considering staff aren't busy helping customers. Overall the worst job I've ever had and customer experiences I've ever had out of every high street shop I have set foot in. 1 star for their clothes, I couldn't go to 2 stars because they are simply that bad.

review_text: I am not complaining about ZARA CLOTHES .i am just writing this review because of their staff.staff are such as#$$....jerk they are unhelpful.plss change your staff and bring someone who are good human being..

Worst customer service experience ever. A lady below mentioned that Zara do not like disabled people I have to agree at least they do not respe. Disabled people a was refused an exanged because I was 2 days overdue I explained the reason was I was hospitalized and couldn't walk due to a leg surgery had hospital certificate , they saw .e Ina well hair and my leg clearly showed my injury. they were rude and cold no empathy no compassion. Pants had the tag on had the receipt the bag everything was all right to be exchanged But they just refused. I do not know if it is Zara that is such disrespectful or if they have hired unexperient and unprofessional personal. Zara never again .

They are Despicable!! STAY AWAY FROM ZARA!! I ordered for the first time and it's been weeks and have not received my package. Their customer service is a joke. I escalated the issue to a manager and it was even worse. No resolution and they keep telling me to wait. Meanwhile, no replacement nor a refund. They have to open a claim and investigation with UPS and wait for their response. The reps. Sound like they are 12 years old and csn barely speak properly. I'm assuming they are hiring young hudlums by paying them a low salary. Bottom line Zara is not what it used to be years ago. Save time and stress heart aches.

Love the clothes, hate the service. The staff show no interest in helping you, they just fob you off. Ordered for next day delivery on Friday. They have taken payment which has cleared my bank account and I have received an order confirmation by email. They have still not delivered my items and when I contacted them Saturday they said there is an issue and I will get an update within 24 hours with no explanation of whats going on. I am still waiting for an update. Update: They are now asking for payment claiming my payment never went through. I told them that payment had cleared my account, so the adviser then said someone will update me within 24hrs. I requested the manager to call me to explain what on earth is going on. Update: They have now cancelled my order but still have my money. Forget asking for help as no one ever calls you back, they just send a system generated email thats no help whatso ever. WORSE CUSTOMER SERVICE EVER!!! Oh and if you chase them up, they will put your query to the back of the que and do it all over again, a member of their staff confirmed this.

went into a store trying to do an exchange for a couple of items from an online order I placed. The sales girl informed me that since it was past the 30 days I had to call online for the exchange and/or store credit. Ive ordered thousands of dollars worth of Zara for my son and the first time I need to make an exchange for size, NEVER ONCE ASKING FOR MY MONEY BACK, they said that since its past the 30 days they cant even offer me an EXCHANGE for a size that he can wear. I spoke with Yasmin who claimed they make exceptions but made it clear I wouldnt be one of them. When I asked to speak with her supervisor I was told they would just continue to reiterate that they wouldnt be making an exception. WHATS THE POINT OF HAVING SUPERVISIORS WHEN CLEARLY THIER SUBORDINATES MAKE ALL THE DECISIONS FOR THEM. I suppose if they treat their employees as badly as the reviews and glass door say I shouldnt expect them to treat the customers any differently. Im glad the sales girl directed me to a dead end and I wasted my time trying to find a resolution. Ill spend my money at a company that values both.

review_title: Is it possible to give a company aĶ
review_text: Is it possible to give a company a minus 10 for customer service for online purchases? if so that would be too much after the experience i have had with the Zara online service. I love the brand itself, but this was the first time i did an online purchase and i am furious.

After being extremely excited to place an order with Zara on the 1st June, you can imagine my disappointment when I did not receive this order within the 5 working day SLA. Using your customer service chat, I tried multiple times to get an urgent update on this delivery as I spent quite a lot of money on this order. When this could not be provided in an agreeable time frame (24 to 48 working hours - a further potential 3 days to just get an update) I used my right to be refunded my purchase as per the consumer rights act. I was told I could not be refunded until the courier had been contacted. This is not acceptable and in my opinion I should have the rights to either: a) receive my purchase or b) be refunded. In all honesty, I do not want this order any longer and I will not be purchasing any clothes online with yourselves again. After unsuccessfully trying multiple times to be escalated to a manager, I have lodged an official complaint and I was told there was no customer facing team I could escalate to. I was left with my refund still not being confirmed. I was also told that my official complaint would be responded to within 24 to 48 hours. I would like an update by close of play today at the latest and an explanation as to why Zara is happy to let a situation like this escalate?

review_title: Couldnt be more insulted after a visit to Liverpool today!
review_text: What an absolute sham! A company who think they are untouchable and beyond the realms of consideration and understanding the circumstances in which some people may loose a paper based receipt. I make 9/10 purchase online and spend an awful lot of money in this store. I purchased 3 items 2 weeks ago and have misplaced the receipt and wanted to exchange one of those items due to poor fit. After waiting in the queue with a frustrated 18 month old I got to the till to be told categorically no receipt no exchange!!! So I replied that I could show proof of extensive online purchases and also the bank statement relating to the purchase of the 3 items.... NOT INTERESTED, its not itemised so basically in her words, Ive potentially stolen the item. Ironic that Im standing there head to toe in their items ... my son included!! I then went to seek out another member of staff, I found a male team member who has served me in the past and tried to dig for some of the reasons why this unusual policy was in place. He basically said its location specific and its a rigid no can do in store. He signposted me to call customer service and said there is some discretionary circumstances where a case number can be provided and given to store so they can process.... so with that little bit of hope I tried.... I wish I hadnt bothered. What an arragant person I got through to. No empathy.... told me I was ridiculous for not tying on in the first place (has he not seen those queues) and if I wanted to escalate then the only way to do so was to get a third party to act on my behalf!!!! What an absolute joke!!! Beyond baffled.....

review_title: I wish there was an option to award ZERO stars.
review_text: I wish there was an option to award ZERO STARS. In short I bought a bag but it turned out there were scratches on it. The bag had all its original tags and packaging intact and all I asked for was an exchange for the same one. Zara completely failed to co-operate, which is SHOCKING I mean they are a massive company, yet their customer service is BEYOND POOR. I am genuinely taken back I didn't expect this from such a prestigious fashion brand. I have had such an awful experience with Zara's customer service providers who basically are robotic and repeat the same thing - "sorry we can't help you on this occasion and thank you for understanding" - like seriously? I even tried tweeting them out in the hope that perhaps taking matters to social media about my disappointment would allow an exchange but no.. the only thing I have learnt is that ZARA have gotten far too big headed. Despite having such a poor rating they do nothing to better themselves. They think their image is invincible as they really DO NOT care about their customers but this will one day cause to be detrimental to their image.
The staff absolutely rubbish, they said they will contact me to fix in 24-48 hours nothing no email no phone never buy online again horrible company.

review_title: RUBBISH STAFF ( oxford street shop, totenham court road London)
review_text: Absolutely avoid this shop, staff is RUBBISH!! In short, i bought 2 weeks ago a trousers (white, size M) really nice design. Usually i'm size M so i did not try it before to purchase. But surprisingly i found out home that this one is too large for me.... I keep in blandly new in its Zara bag for a week at my work, hoping to find time during my lunch break to go back at the shop and kindly ask for exchange with the right size (S). As the trouser stayed in its bag in my drawer at work not it is not ironed so staff refused to exchange it....they said that the trousers is not in the same conditions... What? i said that you are ZARA in oxford street so you just have to iron it. manager told me they do not have any iron! Really?? i have asked to the manager to call other ZARA shops in London to find one with iron... she refused to help. Worst experience of my life with a brand! this is unacceptable ... the trousers is blandly new and i never wore it. I will reconsider to buy again something at Zara with such a bad experience.

review_title: DO NOT SHOP ONLINE AT ZARA. ZERO STARS.
review_text: TLDR: It took me a month to get a package, and now it's taking me 14+ days to get my $100 refund on one of the items. Customer service is TERRIBLE. ~ I *NEVER* write reviews, good or bad- but I really want everyone to know how TERRIBLE of an experience I had with Zara. First with my online order being lost, and then when I tried to return one of the items- now my "refund is lost" after 14 days. (???) I placed an order in mid-April, and they sent me the wrong package. I contacted them for my replacement, sent the incorrect package back in a timely manner (could've kept some of the items as I could tell their operation is pretty unorganized & they wouldn't have known-- BUT, didn't!) & they arranged for a replacement. Got the shipping notification for "express 24-48 hour" shipping. Although after a week the package never came. They said it just got lost & had to send out ANOTHER replacement. I finally got my package almost a month after placing the initial order. I ordered 2 similar jackets to choose from, planning to return 1. Luckily I live by tons of Zara's & was able to return it in person (it probably would've gotten lost in the mail if I shipped it back- lol..) On the receipt, it said my refund would automatically come with in 10-14 days. Pretty long, but I waited. Today is the 14th day- talked to them on the phone & my refund is "missing" so they filed a case.... I have been trying to speak to a supervisor and waited on the phone for 30 minutes & the call was disconnected immediately after I was "being connected to the supervisor" how convenient!!!!

review_title: Absolute joke of a company ,if youĶ
review_text: Absolute joke of a company ,if you don't create an account when purchasing an item returns are impossible after contacting the online chat 5 times ,they still emailed me my receipt (which i already had) and not a returns labels requested, they seem unable to understand the concept of a returns label and make it deliberately difficult to return anything by courier

review_title: Zara in Exeter is completely awful
review_text: Zara in Exeter is completely awful. No organisation you cant find anything asked one of the staff members where an item was and they couldnt even tell me where to look. AVOID AT ALL COSTS. Shopping online would save you more time.
Beautiful and classy

Zara.com's customer service is quite literally the worst I have EVER experienced. I pray that no-one ever has to deal with Bimla, the lady I had the displeasure of speaking to today. She was rude, dismissive and completely unhelpful. A delivery I was expecting is late - I was told that it was in the warehouse - and that's all I was told. When I pushed it a little further I was told that they would get back to me in 48 hours - and there was nothing else they could do. Fantastic. No apology, no explanation, no 'hang on, let me call the warehouse and see when your order will be with you'... just 'is there something else you need' and being told there was nothing else they could do. USELESS

ZARA online will not allow cancellations even if they are offered as an option. They tied today's early AM order with yesterdays order of an entirely different piece and said that is why they could not cancel today's order. I then asked to cancel both orders but they refused. I called PayPal to cancel both orders and was told they could not but I should refuse to accept the two packages when they arrived. I have shopped on this site for more than three years. I have returned a very few items and they take several weeks to refund my money. How difficult should it be to cancel an order within 90 minutes even when offered the option? I was told that the item had already been pulled in the warehouse. That was patently false. They were not even open when I placed the order and then tried to cancel it in early AM. A horrible way to treat any customer especially one that has spent hundreds on their site in the last three years. Terrible customer service.

Worst store ever...i had buy a jacket for my wife from online zara store.but the size of the jacket was not fitted for her.so i had gone to exchange but there is no size remaining.so i had go to store so i can buy another one.but they refuse to take that jacket.they were like return your jacket and your money will be transfer to your account..seriously what a jerk store .do not buy any clothes from online site of zara.

review_text: Worst delivery service in the U.K. They lost my package and couldn't replace my items or locate my order. They sent me something completely different. review_title: Appalling customer service - Liverpool and Trafford
review_text: Lovely clothing - shame about the staff. I have never come across a retailer with such poor / non existent customer service and staff who are downright rude and arrogant . NO customer service skills whatsoever - clearly not a requirement if you want a job there. I don't think I will ever shop in store at Zara again.

review_title: The most disgusting customer service IĶ
review_text: The most disgusting customer service I have ever experienced. Ordered 6 bags on the 23rd. Received ONE. Chased every single day for 7 days and kept being told they were looking into it. I sent an image on Facebook and I confirmed all of this to Customer Services. They actually told me there is nothing I can do. I am out of a hundred pounds and missing 5 products.
Shocking. Had to queue for over 1hr30 to return some faulty clothes in Oxford street branch. Not bothering shopping here again. Totally not set up for 21st century.

Fantastic useless customer service: Welcome to Zara Chat. How can we help you? 11:05 AM Good morning 11:05 AM Hello. My name is xxxx. How can I help you today? 11:06 AM I purchased a dress, which was far too small when it arrived. I tried to exchange it but the next size is not available. So I am returning the dress and I have just wasted 3.95 postage. It would be great if you refunded postage where there is not a repacement available don't you think? 11:07 AM I am sorry to hear that. 11:08 AM Could you please provide your order number, so that I can assist you further? 11:08 AM Please be advised that the order number is stated in the order confirmation email. 11:09 AM sorry - ORDER NUMBER: xxxxxxxx 11:09 AM Thank you. For security reasons, could you please confirm your full name, full billing address with postcode and telephone number? 11:10 AM Details given 11:11 AM Thank you. 11:12 AM Please be advised that you can return the item and purchase it again. 11:13 AM And pay delivery again? 11:14 AM The chat session has ended. Thank you for contacting Zara. 11:14 AM

review_title: Bought items in the sale and decided toĶ
review_text: Bought items in the sale and decided to return all items. I also noticed that the items all had a perfume smell but simply put this down to maybe the boxes or new packaging style. I then got an email saying I would only be refunded on two items as the other was not in a resalable condition. Used there chat service which couldn't tell me much other than the warehouse had refused the refund, then phoned up to ask why the other item was not being refunded, as I had literally only tried all items on and put them back in the box. They told me I had worn it and that it smelt of perfume. I explained that that was the condition I received it in. After days of waiting for review they told me there was nothing they could do and that I had sent it back late etc. I found their costumer service pleasant and but not very helpful. Also just a word of warning to others if your items smell of perfume, that is considered faulty with zara, so make sure you tick the box on the return request!
Rubbish ,sent wrong item!!

MY ADVICE - DO NOT BUY FROM THIS COMPANY. I purchased an item online which arrived a few days later. Unfortunately, although the top looked nice, the material was poor quality and therefore I did not try it on, just put it back in the box and returned it via Royal Mail. As over a week had gone by and I still had not received notification of my return, I contacted Zara via their live chat. They said they would look into it and reply by email within 48 hours. I received no response so rang them, only to be informed that they had received the item but the labels were missing and therefore they were returning the item to me and were unable to refund me as the item was no longer fit for sale. When I explained that the labels were definitely on when I returned it, they would not accept this and said there was nothing they could do. I would definitely not buy from this company again. The labels were definitely on when I returned the top, however, I don't really understand why the lack of a label makes the item no longer fit for sale. Very poor after sales service and I would definitely not recommend this company.

Ordered several items online and once parcel was delivered, I open it to find items which Ive not even ordered. Not a single piece of clothing was what I paid for. Spoke to a gentleman on the phone who arranged someone to pick up the wrong order and I would receive my order the following Monday. I was annoyed as theyre gifts but I said okay seeing as though Id still get my items. Now I didnt receive anything the following Monday, Tuesday, all week in fact. Been waiting three weeks now for something happen. They havent even processed my refund. Taking so much money cant even send me the right items or even refund me! Horrifying shopping experience. Sorry Zara but youve lost a loyal customer due to your lack or priorities! To make it worse they cant even send me a replacement as all items are out of stock seeing as though theyve taken 3 whole weeks to even do anything about it. Absolutely horrified by my shopping experience. Never had this problem ever and still I am waiting. Rubbish customer service!! Spoke to about 6 different people over the phone to not even do their job. What on earth are you getting paid for. Ridiculous. And not a single apology for this whole time.

review_title: Placed an order for one item the weekĶ
review_text: Placed an order for one item the week after it was meant to have arrived I complained it hadn't. Got in touch with zara to let them know, they said their system said it was delivered (which it wasnt) but it would be passed on to the relevant department and someone would be in touch (which they haven't) still no item or refund. DO NOT BUY FROM ZARA ONLINE or you could be robbed

Awful customer service. My items were delivered to the wrong customer. Contacted customer services more than once to resolve the problem and eventually asked for a refund but never heard back. Having to resolve the issue through paypal now to get a refund. Zara still haven't responded.

I am a very loyal Zara customer, I bought many many times online ( if somebody from Zara cs of whoever read this from Zara and would like to know how often Ive ordered from website/ app just let me know and I would love to give you my details so then you can check ). I live in Dordrecht and the nearest Zara for me is in Rotterdam but the reason I preffer online because I know Zara Beursplein most of the time only has 1 kassa open, they dont care how long the queue is. So today (12/07/18) I came to Zara Beursplein to return something because the clothes has a small hole from the alarm, but I lost the receipt and I know (because I am working in retail too) if you want to return something you always need to show your receipt. But a few days ago I was returning clothes from the same receipt (the receipt that I lost) and I still keep the paper (sort of evidence that Ive returning stuffs/ retour bewijs they call it in dutch). And now come the chronology : I came to Zara Beursplein ( around 11 am) and I saw the queue line was long so I went up (to Trafa) and there was nobody at the kassa, a guy from Zara said the kassa is closed and he suggested me to the kassa 1 level up (children section) and I went there, was again a long drama queue, I was standing there for about 20 minutes) and the quite old woman before me was saying something about the queue but the kassa staff only said yeah, I cant do anything about it. Well when it was my turn, I told her the situation, I asked nicely if they can do something with the retour bewijs that I have, maybe theres any possibility to trace the receipt number or something, but she just being not nice to me and even she didnt wanna look at the retour bewijs that I showed her and she sent me to go to ladies section so I went down to Trafa and asked the lady in fitting room ( i think shes an African lady with the dreadlocks hair), she was so nice and she understands my situation but still she couldnt help me further and again ive being sent to go to kassa 1 more level down because they dont have kassa open. When I got down I saw long queue at the kassa so I decided went to fitting room and talked with they guy there. I told him again the story and he brought me to kassa and talked with a woman named Fatima (sorry if I wrote it wrong) and she said I could change with item at the same price and cant return the item and I have to do it immediately ( I cant change another day) but then it was already 1140 and my break was over and I need to go back to work, I asked if I could come back at 1410 when I finished work, she said its ok but then I have to take again the queue line at the kassa. So i went back to work after that and I was thinking in the meantime, I will never come back to that store again, NEVER! especially if I have to take again the queue line, the service by Zara Beursplein is in general bad, kassa always long queue, the staff at the kassa never smiles, sometimes they dont even make eye contact with the customer.

Gift of a shawl was given to me on the 6th of July 2018 by a friend. Went to the store to exchange for a different colour - I was told I need a purchase slip or a gift card/slip by the sales person. I asked to speak to the manager of the Eastgate Store South Africa and was told the same. All I wanted was to exchange for a different colour. No refund, no other product a straight exchange. Zara - you need to review your exchange policy if you are to build your brand in South Africa. Maria Avraamides.

Bought an outfit with sandals for my grandson. Paid for next day delivery, they did arrive tried the sandals on my grandson fastened the buckle on one side and the strap came away at the other side. Totally shoddy workmanship they couldnt have been checked before leaving the warehouse. My grandson has an audition in front of hundreds of people tomorrow. Called Zara couldnt get another pair to me as they were a replacement only if I pay and order a new pair . Wont give me a refund until they receive the item back. Tags still on them.Kept putting me on hold 7 times. Very poor service, at the expense and inconvenience of the customer. How come Next can send out a replacement item for next day delivery and refund you immediately?... Now left with having to go out for shop opening time in the morning to find a replacement which doesnt give him a calm start for his big performance. Thanks for nothing Zara I will NEVER recommend you nor buy from you In store or online again. I wouldnt even give you one star if I had my way.

Unacceptable and rude customer service from the online team on the chat. Spoke to Zee? Rude and argumentative which lead to my decision to return my item and get my money back. I'm not spending my hard earnt money in such a horrible company.
very bad service, they don't know where is my parcel, it was delayed Customer service was Aroosa, did not help me at all, just apologize Never again

review_title: Buyer Beware ..UNSCRUPULOUS and DISHONEST business practices!
review_text: Buyer Beware ... Unscrupulous and Dishonest practices ... Refund was only processed for two out of the three items returned. For $ 70 Canadian, Zara has claimed that we did not return all three items, only two. Four months later, this still has not been resolved. They obviously picked up our items from our address, and somewhere along the line, one of the employees decided to keep one of the items.

Appalling customer service. Took a sale item to the cash desk in the watford store, where the clerk insisted the item was not on sale. I asked him to show me where the item was supposed to be and he had no idea.I could not find anything identical in the whole store but he kept insisting it was the new line and not on sale!!! Just fobbed me off. Called the customer services number which is also a complete waste of time. I do not shop there often but this one experience was enough...... appalling rude and self serving staff.

review_title: Forget Zara because if you ever want toĶ
review_text: Forget Zara because if you ever want to return any items with receipt, make sure you have at least 45 minutes to waste as the refunds queues are getting longer every week! poor customer service!

Absolutely appalling service from Zara. I bought a pair of trousers and the fabric ruined after one wear , i was told in the shop i should not carry a bag when wearing trousers !!!???? Tweeted about it and after a totally pathetic reply that they would forward my complaint to the relevant department i have heard absolutely nothing after loads more messages from myself. I just want a refund for my rubbish trousers please. Don't you care about your customers?

Took 2 items back to the store unfortunately I had lost my receipt but I had proof of purchase from a bank statement I didnt expect a full refund and would have been happy with a credit note or exchange for something of higher value with me paying more money towards it the lady on the till was uninterested and very rude (Swansea branch) she told me the reason this is Zaras policy is because I could be a shoplifter!!! Very insulting and unacceptable in my opinion

I have been loyal customer for many years and used to buy lots of clothes and accessories from Zara. I have never had any problems with returning items online until now. Zara warehouse lost few items which I returned to them for a refund! I lost over ¬£100! I contacted Zara customer service million times about that, ever time I was told the same thing - they will send case to investigate to relevant department! I know that these lost items arrived to warehouse, as I got refunded for other items which were returned in the same boxes which I mentioned to customer service, but Zara warehouse told that they didn't received items from me! Bunch of liars and thieves! From now on I will have to return items to shop, as it's to risky to send returns to Zara warehouse by courier, as they might lose more items and simply tell me that they didn't receive them from me..

Terrible customer service. Ordered a shirt (in large) and some other things and used Apple Pay as it's convenient for me (and probably many others). Order arrived quickly as always, shirt was ok, but thought I would try a medium just for size. Go to account only to find I can only return items, not exchange. Contact the chat, they told me to go to a store as exchanges can only happen online if you pay with a credit/debit card. My nearest store is 30 miles away. My issue was passed onto the 'relevant' department and they got in touch 5 days later but I missed the call so rang back and was told 'nothing can be done and no good will gesture is to be given'. I told the woman I would be happy with free delivery to order the medium shirt and send back whichever I didn't want. She came back and said I could have free delivery, BUT I would have to place the order and then ring them back to get the delivery cost refunded! What the hell? Why is your system so flawed!!!??? People should be able to use ANY payment method and not get penalised if they want to exchange an item.

Very poor service process delivery I've ordered online and got an email that the items have been shipped and been told that the items will be received on specific dates. I've followed on the last day that they told me that it will be delivered and to my disappointment, Zara has not sent it to their warehouse for delivery! It's been more than a week and the item has not processed yet for delivery, to the extent that they already sent an email to the customer informing that the item has been shipped. What a false information! I will never buy Zara again in NZ.

review_title: At the Jockey Plaza store in Lima

Zara does have nice clothes and everything, nevertheless their customer service leaves much to be desired, they should work better at selecting their personal and at training them as well.

review_title: Excellent quality of clothes. Poor customer service.
review_text: Could never fault Zaras quality of clothes, always consistent. However, they have incredibly poor customer service. I have contacted them on every form of available platforms multiple times in relation to online returns, and I have not heard anything back.

review_title: sold me jeans that zip didn't work andĶ
review_text: sold me jeans that zip didn't work and then haven't taken it back or refunded me for it!

review_title: Poor customer service seems to be aĶ
review_text: Poor customer service seems to be a common complaint. In the current climate, we all know that retail is having a tough time, especially sales from actual stores, so you need to get the absolute basics right. The customers experience MUST be positive, which means that your staff MUST know what good customer service looks like. The girl manning the fitting room on the first floor of Zara in Reading at 12.45 today clearly has no idea about customer service. Staring blankly and a customer and not uttering a single word is never going to leave a good impression. Its not rocket science - get it right!! Or customers will vote with their feet and spend elsewhere.

Cant believe what poor customer service Zara has. They dont care about us, they just hide behind policy. I had a purchase that still had the security tag on it. I had lost the receipt so when I went to have it removed they didnt believe I had purchased it. They implied that I stole it. I even showed them the credit card transaction. No matter what level of customer service I went to I was given the same corporate line...without a receipt we cant verify the purchase. In the end they didnt give back the item. I still cant believe it.

Terrible customer service in store and online. In store the cashiers are very rude. Customer support via chat was not helpful. I have waited 5 days for a resolution and no one has come back to me, even after chasing several times. Customer support via the phone is equally awful. I posted back some items in the same package and they are disputing that they received some of them. The representative I spoke to was not apologetic for the problems and made me feel as if I was lying. He was not supportive at all of THEIR mistake. Simply told me I would be contacted in 24-48 hours. Gave me no hope of ever seeing my refund money. Just awful. ASOS would not treat people like this.

review_title: DOES NOT EVEN DESERVE A STAR!!!
review_text: With The footage evidence I have on zara Brent Cross, I would happily write a statement to the police and deal with this legally as I have been kept in the store past closing time without my consent all because the security and staff at Zara wanted to seize my phone. The stuff are extremely rude and lack customer service,..I have been to the Brent Cross store in which I wanted to return an item that I have bought, they clearly saw the tag was still intact and Ive had the original receipt.
