So I guess Im just throwing the items I bought in trash and never shopping at Zara again. Very dumb call to change the policy like that Zara. Customer is clearly last in your big plan.

review_title: Spent 230 online and my order hasĶ
review_text: Spent 230 online and my order has arrived and is completely wrong. Order all womens clothes and been sent mens and childrens! No one will help via whats app of Facebook or X. Keep saying theyre looking into it but dont get back to you and never have a solution. I even asked to make a formal complaint and was told someone will ring me but heard nothing. No contact email and phone number to contact. Absolutely disgusting service and theft. This has caused me extreme distress. I will never shop at Zara again and urge others not too. Shame on Zara. Customers hard earned money just being taken with no care what so ever.

The most pointless and unhelpful customer service chat I have ever experienced. Keep telling you to do the same thing over and over with no actual resolution. Love Zara clothes but their customer service is by far the WORST out there. SORT IT OUT ZARA!!

I was sent a pre-owned Bermudas (strong laundry detergent smell, loose elastic waistband), when I expected some brand new clothes. Customer service agreed for a free return as a "as a one time exception"... Not great customer experience to say the least. Other items were good. Customer service was relatively helpful, but too difficult to reach.

review_title: Non existing customer service, dont risk your money if you have to deal with returns
review_text: Non existing customer service. Issue with return and refund process. Cannot shop with confidence about customer service and returns. Bought four items and returned three. Shop assistant failed to scan one item - I reported on same day. Zara refused to pay for the missing item and said they checked they couldnt find it in the warehouse at the store I returned to. Fine, I earn enough to absorb 9 loss, but will not shop with Zara again. The issue with the process: 1) assistants do not give you a printed receipt at the store so you can double check that items were processed correctly while you are still at the store. 2) I reported the problem immediately after I received the confirmation email yet Zara took two weeks to send me around their chatbots and different case IDs and not actually understanding the problem. There are enough shops and better quality suppliers with actually existing customer service that it is not worth the effort to risk your money.

review_title: first time buying from zara online and last time

review_title: Waiting times worse that trying to see your doctor
review_text: Visited the Southampton store on 26/5/2024. Decided to purchase an item and joined the queue. At this stage there must have been at least 10 people in front of me waiting to pay/return items. Cash desk, that could accommodate 5 cashier points, only had 3 people serving, one of those primarily for returns. Twenty minutes later I am still in the queue, with people behind me trailing half way through the store towards the front door. No word of apology when I got to the cashier desk, with the cashier smirking when it was pointed out to her that the length of time waiting to be served. Spoke with the manager, asking him what he deemed as good customer service and if he thought that his team delivered. He looked extremely confused and said that he thought that they did. I then pointed to the queue snaking through the store and asked him if he thought that contributed to customer satisfaction. The reply was to say that they were experiencing problems with their pay points - is this never addressed? I have visited the store on other occasions and things have been no different, so I have left empty handed. I appreciate that the staff have a tough job, especially when things aren't working properly, but a simple apology when you get to the head of the queue and pay would certainly not be remiss. Yes, there are other till points in the men's section, but this was just as bad. I feel sorry for those that try on the clothes, having waited for up to an hour to do so, and then have to queue for another 40 minutes plus to pay for the item. Will seriously consider my shopping haunts in the future, not that the execs at Zara will really be worried.

address: Aldagte Tower E1 8FA London United Kingdom
review_text: I ordered clothes quite some time ago now which were to be delivered by Evri. After many times of me contacting Evri it was established that my parcel could not be located at their depot and that I should contact Shein, which I have done many times now. Not only have I not received a refund, they have totally ignored my emails. As far as I'm concerned they have "stolen" my money and I will be taking further steps to retrieve it. My advice is do not shop with Shein. They take your order but don't deliver. Have now had Shein's "standard response" which, according to other reviewers is a total waste of time and I am not prepared to add more correspondence to that already sent to them. My case, similar to others, could not be more simple. Evri acknowledged that the Shein parcel could not be located at their depot, therefore not delivered. The responsibility lies with the seller (Shein) and not the courier (Evri) and it is the seller's responsibility to expedite the matter quickly. It appears obvious that Shein consider themselves "untouchable". One can only hope that the many comments made by reviewers, of a similar nature, will deter shoppers choosing Shein and that their business will eventually fail. Christmas will soon be here and I have advised both Family and Friends not to buy from Shein and always check with whomever they intend to buy from, which courier they use for deliveries and if they respond "Evri" then shop elsewhere ! In my opinion my money has been stolen and that is a crime which requires investigation and punishment.

review_text: Would not buy from them again. Ordered ¬£155 worth of clothes 2 weeks ago. We needed the clothes/swimwear for a holiday. Even though shipping was free we paid ¬£9 for express which was then due within 7 days. Delivery date came and went. Contacted them, the package was still waiting to be shipped to the airport from their warehouse. Was told the order was escalated to the logistics team as high priority (there was no pause on the chat, they literally replied the escalated it in seconds, so either they have one hell of an escalation software that is super quick or this was a lie). A few days go by and still nothing. Now we are the day before we are due to go on holiday and the package still has not left their warehouse for the airport. My sister ordered the day after us and she received her items last week. Was given a load of excuses about logistics being delayed etc - repeatedly. Now we leave in 24 hours for 3 weeks with no swimwear, sandals, etc etc so I now need to go shopping after work to try buy some last minute at 6pm (Not many places are going to be open!). Equally, our local Evri driver has a habit of launching parcels over the gate. So this parcel could now be in the garden for 3 weeks until we are back. I told Shein this and they werent bothered (however did say if anything is damaged we wont be able to return it. It will be outside for weeks of course its going to be damaged! I asked multiple times just cancel the order. No they cant do that either.) So they cant give me an update of when it'll be delivered, cant send a note to Evri to tell them not to attempt delivery and wont refund if anything if damaged. First time ordering. Wont order them again. What an absolute nightmare. First holiday abroad and no swimwear, beach wear or footwear and now we will come home to a damaged parcel I can not return. What an absolute waste of ¬£164!

review_text: My first order went ok and I liked the items (hence 1 star), but my second order has put me off ever using this company again. I returned 3 items. That's when I found their customer service has no email address or phone number, just the online chat bot which gives you generic answers, going round in circles. Basically, no customer service. I looked on Facebook and found that many people had experienced problems with refunds not being given or charged yet goods not delivered. These other people were not able to contact either. address: Aldagte Tower E1 8FA London United Kingdom
review_title: Beware they charge a handling fee!!!!
review_text: Ive Always really liked SHEIN, some of their clothing can be good quality and very cheap to buy and never had any issues up until now. Recently I purchased 400 worth of clothing for my holiday which was sent in two separate deliveries. One arrived on time before my holiday, the other (which was the one that had most of the order in that I needed) arrived about a week later which was too late and after my holiday therefore I could not use them for what they were intended, therefore I sent everything back. When I created the return it was 49 short of what I had initially paid so I contacted their customer services and they told me that I had to pay 49 for a handling fee because of the amount I had spent with them!!! I had absolutely no idea that this was even a thing, I wasnt made aware at the point of purchase that I had to pay this otherwise I would NEVER had made the purchase. Why would I give away 49 for a company to do their job that every other online company also has to do but doesnt charge for?! Its a total scam to get more money from people without them realising. They charge such little prices for their items so that you keep spending and then charge you for getting the items from their warehouse?! Now Ive given 49 of my own money away for nothing and I didnt even get to use any of the clothes I purchased for my holiday!! I wont be using this scam company again. Ive also complained about this and sent several emails and Ive been totally ignored. Since writing this review Ive contacted shein to complain and they closed my ticket and said someone would contact me within 24 hours to resolve. No one has contacted me and my ticket has been closed down. Ive tried to contact them again which is totally impossible because you can only speak to a robot and Im not able to raise another ticket. So Ive been charged 50 for no reason and totally ignored. What a terrible terrible company

review_title: They don't mind putting people in financial hardship
review_text: The now well known handling fee caught me out on 3 orders, I have attempted to file complaints that get instantly closed down and spoken to countless members of staff who all send auto responses and don't actually answer your questions. I completed 3 orders of ¬£200 and was charged ¬£95 in hidden handling fees, which it tells you after are non-refundable. I have been placed in financial difficulty following these fees and they will not do anything to help me, their customer service is scripted, complaints team doesn't exist and their products are cheap. The irony of the handling fee is they say its to cover costs but you don't have to pay it under a certain amount, so if I did 6 orders instead of 3 I would have saved ¬£95 but they would have to do twice as much work. They also split all of their parcels so there is never more than ¬£180 worth of products within a parcel they are sending. Possibly the worst retailer I have dealt with, I guess you get what you pay for, it's a shame they con people with hidden no refundable fees to make profit. Will never shop here again and I sincerely hope others stop as soon as possible.

address: Aldagte Tower E1 8FA London United Kingdom
review_title: Disappointed to say the least, Shein no shame.
review_text: I have been a Shein's customer for quite a while. I have ordered quite a lot during this time, and so far so good, until now. On the 19th of october 2023 I returned 2 parcels with some goods and I wasn't given the return ticket you normally get, but considering it was my local parcelshop (I always receive and return my stuff from there) I didn't really gave any thought other than, well, the parcels have been scanned and put it aside so it should be fine, maybe they run out of tickets, whatever... After a week or so I still wasn't given my refund yet and I started to contact Shein just telling me to wait, normally takes 14 days, it showed like the refund was on progress and as soon the parcels arrived to the warehouse they will procces my refund. Another week went by and when I contacted Shein agan,this time the agent on the chat asked my for the return receipt but when I explained again I wasn't given one the beginning of this nighmare started. They completely have ignored anything than I have explained, they just kept asking me the same question, if I have the refund receipt. Then, they advised me to contact the courier Evri, they even told me to contact my bank for a chargeback, any excuse, but actually no help to find a solution. Fine. I get it. You don't have your good you won't give a refund. So I contacted Evri which they opened a case to investigate where they couldn't find the parcels nor the tracking number. I gave proof to Evri with the time, the day, and the parcelshop I handed the parcels and I even tried to get proof of cctv footage. After weeks of many emails back and forth they replied to me and apologizing for such a poor customer service and they are taking full responsability for the missing parcels. I have forwarded the email to Shein and guess what! they are still replying me for the refund ticket and not even reading the email where Evri stated they are willing to work with Shein throughout the process once they contact Evri to make a claim!! What else do you need Shein??? To this day, 19/11/2023, I still have not money back. Shein continues answering me with the same automated reply asking the same load of baloney. I keep sending the same proof that everything I have done it has been done accordingly and legit. I do not what else to do. I really wonder if there is any real person/customer service you can actually talk to?? Ironically, I am stil waiting for some more orders which, believe me, there will be the last ones. Not worth this stress, considering the amount of places where to shop this days even if I have to pay a little bit more. Thanks but no thanks Shein. Just, please, give me my money back. And please do not reply to this review with another automated response, be better.

Worst customer service ever received! Paid ¬£400 for a dining table to use for the festivities. The order was delayed and when it got to me it was heavily damaged. I now had to find place to store two huge boxes in my one bed flat, in the time of year I have guests everyday! Contacting CS is so stressful! They do the very bare minimum by replying with templates and not reading your emails! While the collection of the damaged delivery has been arranged relatively quickly, no one has even had the decency to address a redelivery and whether I will be having the table for Christmas or my guests will have to eat on the floor! Every time I have emailed them with my response, a different agent replies and do not answer your questions! Twice I have been sent back the same template email but from a different agent and without response to my query. To date, they have taken ¬£400 from me and no sign of a new table and it looks like I will have no table for Christmas! No sign of compensation, no apology for ruining my Christmas, no sign of a manager to speak to and no number to call!! They are acting like a scam company and after receiving responses from 5 different agents they are now IGNORING me!

review_title: Charged twice for a product that I never receivedĶ
review_text: I ordered an item from Urban Outfitters in early December as a Christmas gift that was advertising 3 - 5 day delivery time. About a week later the item still had not arrived, then I received an email to say that it would not be shipped until December 23. Nervous that it would not arrive in time for Christmas, I quickly went to Amazon and found the same item with next day delivery. I messaged UO to cancel my order, but they told me the item had already been shipped and there was nothing they could do, so I would need to return the item when I receive it. The next day, my bank account was charged a second time, I once again reached out to UO and they told me it was more than likely a pre-authorisation so I would need to dispute the charge with my bank. I have now been charged twice for an item that I still havent received and we are 3 days past Christmas, almost 2 weeks after I originally placed the order. Today I received an email from Evri to say that I missed an attempted delivery, but I have not received any other communication about when the delivery would be attempted, asking if I will be home or would like to rearrange. Evri is the worst delivery service, of course UO use them. At this stage I just want my money back and will not be ordering from UO online again.

Another 24 hours later 1 part of my order turned up no sign of the other item. I emailed again- no response but the cost of the missing item has been refunded this morning so I assume Im not getting it. As part 2 was a turntable, the amp I did receive is pretty superfluous as are the vinyl records the intended recipient got as Christmas presents. review_title: A dress I paid extra to have deliveredĶ
review_text: A dress I paid extra to have delivered next-day-delivery to an address we were staying at for New Years Eve wasn't delivered when it should have been (expected delivery 30/12/23). I rang Royal Mail on 31/12/23 but they we closed, then I rang them again on 2/1/24 to ask them to halt the delivery and return to UO as we live a 100 miles away from the address the dress was being delivered to (and we have since returned home 100 miles away and have no way to return the dress), but they wouldn't. However, Royal Mail assured me they wouldn't leave it on the doorstep, but I now have a photo from Royal Mail showing on 3/1/24 that they'd left it on the doorstep! The whole ordeal has been infuriating with UO and Royal Mail. Firstly I paid to have the dress delivered on 30/12/23 but it wasn't. Secondly, Royal Mail promised me it wouldn't be left on the doorstep, instead they said it would be returned to their sorting office when no-one accepted in person the delivery, and returned to UO. Yet neither UO or Royal Mail have fulfilled their promises or are taking any responsibility for the shocking service I have received. I physically cannot, and will not, drive over 100 miles to retrieve a dress which is probably no longer on the doorstep - its very unlikely to still be there! UO has been shockingly horrendous whenever I have contacted them asking for any kind of help or ownership for the poor service, instead they keep saying I have to return the dress for a refund. How am I going to do that?! I paid for the dress to be delivered when we were at that address, UO didn't fulfil the delivery date. None of the awful service Ive received is my fault, and I am appalled with the whole situation and will not be buying from UO again. I will be taking the matter further if I do not receive a full refund!

Absolutely disgusting customer service! My order (a park flat pack piece of furniture) was left propped up on the street outside of my building whilst I was away for a week. When I got back, it was gone. I contacted UO immediately by phone and was told to call back on Monday. When I did I was told I needed to email instead. I did, provided evidence from the couriers tracking (inc a picture theyd taken) showing it hadnt been delivered to me and the shocking place it had been left. They told me I needed to contact the police and report it as a crime before theyd refund me. Not only is this totally against UK trading standards law, at no point was i evened offered an apology. After going back and forth via email explaining they were in breach of consumer law AND their contract with me as a retailer (and been advised this by trading standards and informed UO of where this advice had come from) they did not care a d totally ignored this. I tried to get a refund via PayPal but UO refused it stating my order had been received. In the end I called the police and as expected they couldnt do anything as I couldnt tell them if the item and been actually stolen or simply removed. I contacted the courier (Id contacted them already and theyd told me to speak to UO about the issue) and this time they reviewed the delivery tracking immediately apologised, acknowledged the order hadnt be delivered to my address and told me to get UO to issue a refund and theyd reimburse them. I was told to forward their email to UO which I did and UO still refused my refund stating I still needed to provide a police report. Even though the courier had said theyd reimburse them the full amount they withheld my refund for about another week of me calling and emailing when they finally conceded what Id told them weeks before that my order hadnt been delivered to my address. No apology. No acknowledgement to their conduct in dealing with the issue. I asked them for their complaints procedure which they would not publicly disclose, they said to issue a complaint with their customer service team (which Id already done 3 times and had ignored 3 times) said they didnt have to adhere to any trading standards rulings and offered a small discount if I shopped with them again, as if Id consider placing another order with a company who treats customers like this. Absolutely disgusted by Urban Outfitters. The only people who seemed to genuinely want to help were the people I spoke to at their oversees call Center and they had no power to do so whatsoever. Update- the response se to my review from Urban Outfitters does not make up for or in any way compensate me for the weeks of misery your team put me through without a word of apology from any of them and this response neither explains the terrible treatment I received more makes the situation any better.

review_title: Do not order order gift cards ! Dont believe their pro-mo cards. They do NOT deduct this amount even when their customer care team have confirmed the promo discounts will be applied.
review_text: I ordered an e-gift card on 22 Feb having seen these offers on your website( Variious discounts dependant on value of card ) NOT APPLIED . I spoke to Michael at your company immediately who assured me the discount would be taken off when ecard processed. Instead full ¬£50 was taken . Today I have been told not so. There was NO promo code on gift cards. Complete lie and mis-selling. Only offered another promo-code. Disgusting service. Pack of lies.

(I would have been necessary to contact my bank and then phone Urban outfitters. In another Webshop where I bought a voucher instead, my credit card worked right away. It was necessary to add my address several times, although I had added it before. If I can get what I need elsewhere, I will refrain from buying at Urban Outfitters.

Item not in stock. Only notified of this once paid for with no update as to when I could expect to receive. Shipping cost was extortionate. Was in a rush buying my item, cashier took absolutely forever serving another girl while talking to her friend, then when it came to my turn she ignored me for a good while before realising I was there! Then when she finally served me, she spent more time chatting to her friend than actually doing her job, so much so that her colleague took over! I never usually write a review, but having worked in retail myself, I felt completely disrespected and irrelevant. Worst and rudest customer service I think Ive experienced. Its a shame too as I love UA; the store itself was great. Huge shame about that one female staff member

review_title: The gift card had a pre-printed sticker
review_text: The gift card had a pre-printed sticker over the place where you would normally hand-write the recipients name and who it was from and a nice message. The sticker said "From (buyers full name)" where we wanted to write "To (nephew)" and "From Uncle (me) and Aunt (wife)" and "Happy Birthday". We managed to remove the sticker but it left a sticky residue. If it was being delivered to a different name and address to the purchaser it would be nice to allow the buyer to specify the message, but if it's being delivered to the person who bought it, it should just be left blank.

review_title: Already posted one review about myĶ
review_text: Already posted one review about my order but heres one for the customer service team. So I placed my order on the 28th of march, contacted customer support and after many attempts someone finally told me my package has gone missing. Since then I have tried to contact them again about getting a refund or a replacement item but I have once again been unsuccessful. Its now been almost 6 weeks since I placed my order

Used their site to place an order, order looked like it went through as screen said so. Didnt get email other than relentless junk so checked my bank account and no transaction. Redid order and found their site had saved my card details without permission. Customer service chat while responsive would only respond with how my feedback will improve future customer experience. Summary: wont get my order in time, saved my card details without permission and customer service is terrible. Id give their website a hard pass and never order again.

review_title: I dont even know where to begin
review_text: I dont even know where to begin. Ordered something for a gift. Didnt arrive. No email to let me know delayed. Once I enquired through various tedious chatbot conversations (going round in circles) I was finally told I had a two week wait. Tried to cancel. Wasnt cancelled. Tried to cancel again, think it worked but still havent had a refund for the item despite being told 3-5 working days. That was a week ago. Wasting half of my life trying to get my money back. Escalated to head office apparently but guess what? Have to wait another 3 days for a reply. Absolute joke. Awful customer service.

No voucher email to my goddaughter, no responses to my two follow up emails. I only hope they read this and start taking their performance more seriouslyĶ

review_title: I just really need Urban to examineĶ
review_text: I just really need Urban to examine their logistics processes and implement some changes to reduce the number of customer impacting issues. I am someone who shops many large brand stores. Urban is BY FAR the worst when it comes to shipping incorrect items, damaged items, shipping to the incorrect address. I order from them a lot and I would say close to 30% of my orders wind up having one of the above issues. By comparison I also order from Sephora a lot. Over the years I have only had one instance of an order from them that never showed up. Never had an order with incorrect items. Urban absolutely can and should do better.

My daughter brought an e-gift card on-line from the official UO website. The e-voucher was never received - we had about 12 e-mail exchanges where U/O said they would re-send the e-card or give a refund - neither turned up. My daughter has more or less given up on hearing from UO, but I think their failure to deliver and poor customer service should be shared. UO please feel free to reply with who to contact and how my daughter can get her money back as we still have all the reference numbers. It was a while ago - but I only found out today so have taken on the challenge.

review_title: The delivery is too slow and product quality not worth the price
review_text: The delivery is too slow. On the way here my package got lost so I had to wait almost three weeks. I sent my return package back on May 17th. Today (10 days later) it still has not arrived at UO. I would like my money back asap. Besides that, I'm generally disappointed in how expensive the clothes are and yet they use the worst materials. The only positive thing, in my experience, was that UO's designs are cute.
